# Noori — Luxury Lab-Grown Diamond Jewelry

> Noori creates heirloom-quality lab-grown diamond jewelry — pendants, earrings, and bracelets — in 14K and 18K gold. Every diamond is IGI-certified, ethically sourced via Chemical Vapor Deposition (CVD), and graded D–F colour / VS1–VVS1 clarity. Modern luxury, finally within reach. Founded in Canada, Noori partners with UNICEF to give back with every purchase.

## About Noori
- [Our Story](https://noori.design/policies): Brand mission, values, UNICEF partnership, and sourcing philosophy
- [Why Lab-Grown Diamonds](https://noori.design/why-lab-diamonds): CVD process, 4Cs grading, lab-grown vs mined comparison
- [FAQ](https://noori.design/faq): Care, shipping, returns, warranty, and diamond education
- [Contact](https://noori.design/why-noori): Customer support and inquiries

## Collections
- [Vela Solitaire Collection](https://noori.design/collections/solitaires): Full catalog of pendants, studs, and bracelets

## Products — Pendants
- [Round Vela Pendant](https://noori.design/product/round-vela-pendant): Round brilliant solitaire pendant, 14K/18K gold, from $2,175
- [Princess Vela Pendant](https://noori.design/product/princess-vela-pendant): Princess-cut solitaire pendant, 14K/18K gold
- [Emerald Vela Pendant](https://noori.design/product/emerald-vela-pendant): Emerald-cut solitaire pendant, 14K/18K gold

## Products — Earrings
- [Round Vela Studs](https://noori.design/product/round-vela-studs): Round brilliant stud earrings, 14K/18K gold
- [Princess Vela Studs](https://noori.design/product/princess-vela-studs): Princess-cut stud earrings, 14K/18K gold
- [Emerald Vela Studs](https://noori.design/product/emerald-vela-studs): Emerald-cut stud earrings, 14K/18K gold

## Products — Bracelets
- [Vela Bracelet](https://noori.design/product/vela-bracelet): Diamond cable chain bracelet, 14K/18K gold
- [Vela Bracelet 2ct](https://noori.design/product/vela-bracelet-2ct): 2ct diamond cable chain bracelet, 14K/18K gold
